Title: Successful Google Sign-In and Family Activity Transition
Preconditions:
- User has Google account linked to the app.
- Internet connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Sign In with Google"** in `LoginActivity`.
2. User enters valid credentials and grants permissions.
3. System calls `handleSignInTask` in `LoginActivity`.
4. System transitions to `joinFamilyActivity`.
Expected Result:
- User is authenticated successfully.
- `joinFamilyActivity` loads without errors.
- No error messages or crashes occur.

Title: Failed Google Sign-In with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: - User attempts to sign in with invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Sign In with Google"** in `LoginActivity`.
2. User enters invalid credentials and submits.
3. System calls `handleSignInTask` and fails.
Expected Result:
- Error message appears: *"Invalid email or password."*
- User remains on `LoginActivity`.
- No transition to `joinFamilyActivity`.

Title: Sign Out from Profile Activity
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to `ProfileActivity`.
2. User taps **"Sign Out"** (assumed to call `abbandona` on `GoogleSignInClient`).
3. System triggers `abbandona` method.
Expected Result:
- User is signed out of Google.
- System returns to `LoginActivity`.
- All session data is cleared.

Title: Start and Add Document Workflow
Preconditions: - User is authenticated and on a screen with **"Avvia Documento"** action.
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Avvia Documento"** (triggering `Avvia Documento` action).
2. System transitions to **"Aggiungi Documento"** action.
3. User uploads a document (e.g., PDF file named `report_2023.pdf`).
4. System associates document with user attributes:
   - User ID: `1467522076`
   - Name: `Sebastiano`
   - Surname: `Cavalli`
   - Date: `15/01/2023`
   - Side: `Sinistra`
   - Image URL: `https://img.googleusercontent.com/a/6dF-T4jQOGJ4tbe46i`
Expected Result:
- Document is uploaded successfully.
- Metadata (user attributes) is saved with the document.
- Confirmation message: *"Document added successfully."*

Title: Add Document with Missing Metadata
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Avvia Documento"**.
2. User skips filling in **Side** field (leaves it blank).
3. User uploads a document.
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"Side field is required."*
- Document is **not** saved.
- User remains on **"Aggiungi Documento"** screen.

Title: Add Document with Invalid Image URL
Test Steps:
1. User enters all metadata correctly except **Image URL** (uses invalid URL: `htp://invalid.url`).
2. User uploads a document.
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"Invalid image URL format."*
- Document is **not** saved.
- User remains on the screen with the invalid URL highlighted.

Title: Home → Menu → Monitoring Section → Return to Menu
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Accesso al menu a fondo"** (transition="SI").
2. System navigates to `Sezione di monitoraggio` (transition="SI").
3. User taps **"Ritorno alla home"** (transition="NO" from monitoring).
4. System returns to `Accesso al menu a fondo`.
Expected Result:
- Navigation flows smoothly between states.
- No crashes or broken UI elements.
- Menu options are visible and clickable.

Title: Home → Menu → Notes Section → Return to Home
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Accesso al menu a fondo"** (transition="SI").
2. User selects **"Note"** section (transition="NO").
3. User taps **"Ritorno alla home"** (transition="NO").
Expected Result:
- User lands in `Note` section.
- Tapping **"Ritorno alla home"** returns user to `HOME`.
- No data loss or UI corruption.

Title: Direct Return to Home from Monitoring Section
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to `HOME` screen.
- No intermediate steps or errors.

Title: Navigate from Home to GraphConnectFragment
Test Steps:
1. User taps a menu item to open `GraphConnectFragment`.
2. `HomeActivity` calls `replaceFragment` to load `GraphConnectFragment`.
3. `GraphConnectFragment` calls `graphConnectView`.
Expected Result:
- `GraphConnectFragment` loads successfully.
- Graph visualization renders without errors.
- No memory leaks or crashes.

Title: Edit and Save Note
Preconditions: - User is on `NoteFragment` and taps to edit a note.
Test Steps:
1. User taps a note to open `EditNoteFragment`.
2. User edits note text (e.g., adds *"Follow-up: 20/01/2023"*).
3. User taps **"Save"** (assumed to call `EditNoteFragment` save logic).
4. System returns to `NoteFragment`.
Expected Result:
- Note is updated in `NoteFragment`.
- Confirmation toast: *"Note saved successfully."*
- No data corruption.

Title: Load SonnoFragment Without Data
Preconditions: - User has no sleep data recorded.
Expected Result:
- Empty state UI is displayed (e.g., *"No sleep data available"*).
- Option to add manual entry is visible.
- No crashes.

Title: Rapid Menu Navigation (SI/NO Transitions)
Test Steps:
1. User rapidly toggles between:
   - `HOME` → `Accesso al menu a fondo` (SI) → `Sezione di monitoraggio` (SI) → `Accesso al menu a fondo` (NO) → `Note` (NO) → `Ritorno alla home` (NO).
   - Repeat 5 times.
Expected Result:
- System handles rapid transitions without crashes.
- UI remains responsive.
- No duplicate state entries or errors.

Title: Document Upload with Special Characters in Metadata
Test Steps:
1. User enters metadata with special characters:
   - Name: `Sebastiano O'Reilly`
   - Surname: `Cavalli-Vanini`
   - Side: `Destra/Sinistra` (hyphenated).
2. User uploads a document.
Expected Result:
- System accepts special characters without errors.
- Document is saved with metadata intact.
- No encoding issues.

Title: Offline Mode – Document Upload Failure
Test Steps:
1. User taps **"Avvia Documento"**.
2. User attempts to upload a document.
Expected Result:
- Error message: *"No internet connection. Please check your connection."*
- User can retry after reconnecting.
- No data is lost on reconnection.
